response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for the song 'BE MY FLAME'. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized for the performance segment; the talking segment required manual transcription and translation of Japanese speech as it was absent from the reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive end-time truncation during the talking segment to maintain synchronization with rapid-fire English and Japanese explanations. Included a subtitle for the silent title card to provide context before dialogue begins.
